baseline: Confirmed stable production v6.8.1 Reusable Schools Edition
edition: Reusable Schools, Supabase Dashboard and GitHub Pages Edition

scheduled-backup.internal_auth: x-cron-secret for schedules; JWT plus MFA AAL2 for manual administration

final_build_improvements: Restored authenticated Storage-policy execution of can_publish_report without widening publication authority
Bucket-gated report PDF and report-card template Storage policies that prevent cross-bucket authorization evaluation
Working official PDF creation, registration, refresh, and latest-PDF availability for authorized class teachers and System Administrators
Working System Administrator upload, replacement, preview, download, and removal of class-range report-card templates
Class-teacher-only individual submission of complete reports for Principal approval
Subject-teacher submission and publication blocked at the database authorization layer
Class teacher and System Administrator publication authority after Principal approval
Class-level bulk submit, Principal bulk approve, and class-level bulk publish workflows
Bulk workflow result isolation for incomplete reports, missing reports, and per-report failures
Automatic official PDF storage following successful bulk publication
Alphabetical full-name ordering for student, teacher, principal, and user directories
Strict current-placement student visibility for officially assigned class and subject teachers
Promotion-controlled active enrolment transfer to the next class
Class-teacher-only daily attendance register
Automatic term attendance totals synchronized to report cards
Attendance registers included in encrypted scheduled backups
Complete encrypted database, Auth metadata and private Storage backup
AES-256-GCM NISB2 encryption with separate required backup key
Retention policy, weekly verification and administrator-confirmed off-site copy tracking
Offline decryption and recovery package generation
Consistent Edge Function service-key handling and exact pinned imports
Local pinned frontend dependencies without runtime CDN dependence
Approval-gated Term 3 promotion enrolment creation
New permanent 05_schema.sql continuation file
System Administrator GitHub Navigator and reusable school package generator
Generated school identity across login, MFA, sidebar, verification, reports, manifest and icons
Configurable user-account email domain in school settings
Optional reusable-package email domain with safe school-specific .invalid fallback
Bounded vertical scrolling with sticky table headings for operational directories and long report lists
Compact scrollable student list for New Report Card selection
Responsive list-height controls that prevent long pages on desktop and mobile
Deep-blue remarks in official and manual report-card rendering
Adaptive subject table that retains exactly one blank line box after the final subject
Class-and-term bulk ZIP download of latest published report PDFs for System Administrators and assigned teachers
Bulk package manifest, per-report error isolation, and current-format regeneration before download

verification_scope.package_level: SQL lexical structure and workflow feature assertions, JavaScript and service-worker syntax, TypeScript transpilation syntax, JSON parsing, frontend mirror parity, reusable-generator source completeness, authorization assertions, checksum generation, and ZIP integrity testing
verification_scope.not_available_in_build_environment: Live execution against the school Supabase project, production Row Level Security acceptance, real-account browser workflows, email delivery, and scheduled Edge runtime execution
verification_scope.required_after_deployment: Run the role-based Storage and PDF acceptance procedures in UPGRADE_FROM_V6_8_1_TO_V6_8_2.txt before declaring the deployment accepted

reusable_school_generator.navigation: System Administrator > GitHub Navigator, immediately after Settings
reusable_school_generator.security: Rejects Supabase Secret and service-role keys; generation is browser-local and does not alter the current installation
reusable_school_generator.email_domain_behavior: Uses a supplied valid domain or generates a non-deliverable school-specific .invalid placeholder when left blank
